codeReview.summary: Re-review after fixes to 5 blocking broken-link issues from the prior review. All 5 issues have been verified as resolved: (1) ADR-004 link now uses full filename `ADR-004-layered-audit-surfaces.md` ✓, (2) ADR-003 link now uses full filename `ADR-003-outbox-pattern-for-cross-module-events.md` in both occurrences (Core Idempotency and Orchestration rows) ✓, (3) ADR-005 link now uses full filename `ADR-005-flyway-v2-hard-cut-migration-posture.md` ✓, (4) Accounting AGENTS.md links corrected from `../../erp-domain/` to `../erp-domain/` in both the feature table (line 104) and Module Directory table (line 148) ✓. All other relative links in the catalog were also spot-checked and resolve correctly to existing files on disk.

summary: All 5 blocking broken-link issues from the prior review have been verified as fixed. ADR links (003, 004, 005) now use correct full filenames, and the accounting AGENTS.md relative paths now correctly use `../erp-domain/` instead of `../../erp-domain/`. The catalog fully satisfies VAL-FOUND-009: it is exhaustive across all 15 live modules, organized into 4 navigable feature family groups with 11 cross-module flows, includes explicit deprecated/non-canonical surface tables in every section, links to deeper canonical module/flow/ADR packets, and is discoverable from docs/INDEX.md.
